coverage_set.rationale: Greedy vertex cover (2-approx): iteratively pick highest uncovered degree until edges are covered or cap is reached.
coverage_set.how_to_use: Small vertex cover touching all dependency edges. Use for breadth coverage.

k_paths.how_to_use: K-shortest critical paths. Focus on issues appearing in multiple paths.

parallel_cut.how_to_use: Issues that enable parallel work. Complete to maximize team throughput.

parallel_gain.how_to_use: Parallelization improvement from completing each issue.

cycle_break.how_to_use: Structural fix suggestions. Apply BEFORE working on cycle members.
cycle_break.advisory: No cycles detected - dependency graph is a proper DAG.

usage_hints.coverage_set: Small vertex cover touching all dependency edges. Use for breadth coverage.

usage_hints.k_paths: K-shortest critical paths. Focus on issues appearing in multiple paths.

usage_hints: jq '.full_stats.core_number | to_entries | sort_by(-.value)[:5]' - Strongly embedded nodes (k-core)
jq '.Slack[:5]' - Nodes with slack (good parallel work candidates)
jq '.Cycles | length' - Count of detected cycles
